summary: Comprehensive testing of Pierre-Olivier Caouette financial advisor website. Backend APIs fully functional. Frontend mostly working with session persistence issues affecting authenticated user experience.

ui_bugs.issue: User sessions don't persist across page navigation - users get logged out
ui_bugs.details: Login works initially but session is lost when navigating to /profil or other authenticated routes

integration_issues.issue: Profile page redirects to login due to session loss
Cannot test referral form due to profile access issues

design_issues.issue: GoHighLevel calendar integration shows placeholder code instead of embedded calendar
design_issues.details: Shows iframe embed code as text instead of functional calendar widget

passed_tests: Tools page shows correct locked/unlocked states
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix JWT session persistence in AuthContext - tokens are not being properly stored or retrieved across page navigation. This prevents full testing of authenticated features like profile management and referral system. Also implement GoHighLevel calendar integration properly on appointment page.
